name: Incorrect Privilege Assignment
description: The product incorrectly assigns a privilege to a particular actor, creating an unintended sphere of control. This allows the actor to perform actions beyond their intended authorization level, potentially accessing sensitive functionality or administrative capabilities.
detection_pattern: Look for AUTH nodes (privilege assignment, role mapping, permission grants) that assign elevated privileges to EXTERNAL or STRUCTURAL nodes (user accounts, service accounts, processes) without a CONTROL mediator (least privilege enforcement, privilege audit, role validation) that verifies the assigned privileges match the actor's intended authorization scope.
